revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-3-210

A filament (usually of multi-vee formation) in the form of a hollow circular cylinder generated around the axis of the lamp.

[[Image:Ch2_Fig29.jpg|400px|border]]


Note: The filament may be fully closed in plan, or may embrace an arc of less than 360 degrees.

The English term "Cylindrical filament" is usually limited to the case of a closed cylinder.

Otherwise, the English term used is "Bunch filament" (2-3-220).


{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Cylindrical Filament}}
